title: ScreeningDecision
description: AI-output schema. Must be minimal and strict. Default to 'apply' unless hard rule clearly triggers.

decision.description: Screening outcome. Default to 'apply' unless hard rule clearly triggers.

matched_reject_rules.description: List of reject rule names that triggered. Must be non-empty if decision is 'reject'.

evidence.description: Short strings grounded in posting text. Must be non-empty if decision is 'reject'.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when decision was made

role_domain.description: Approved role-domain category the model assigned, or 'unknown'. Always recorded for audit, regardless of whether role_domain is an active reject factor. Synthetic location-prefilter rejects use 'unknown'.

industry.description: Approved industry category the model assigned, or 'unknown'. Always recorded for audit, regardless of whether industry is an active reject factor. Synthetic location-prefilter rejects use 'unknown'.

experience_years_required.description: Minimum years of relevant experience the posting hard-requires; null if unspecified, ambiguous, or for synthetic location-prefilter rejects. Always recorded for audit, regardless of whether experience is an active reject factor.
